Transcrição Completa: 9 Google Listing

 

[00:00] "Hey guys. So, this is an example of building your strategic referral network. This is actually pretty funny. I I'm not affiliated with this company that I'm looking at right here. It's called GM GMBB Genie. Okay, I just looked this up and I mean, the guy's got like 40 something likes on his Facebook page."

 

[00:20] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "GMBB Genie - Instantly Verified Google Business Listings"

 

NÚMEROS: 40+ likes no Facebook, $150 (1 listing), $650 (5 listings), $1,000 (10 listings)

 

VISUAL: Interface da página do serviço GMBB Genie, estrutura de pricing em tiers, garantia de verificação antes do pagamento

 

[00:22] "Uh, but check this out. Okay, instantly verified Google business listings and I'm looking at the cost down here. Number one, they guarantee the verified listing prior to taking payment. And in addition to that, for one listing, it's 150 bucks. Okay? If the person has five locations or five different businesses, it's 650 bucks. And for 10 listings, it's a,000."

 

[00:48] "And as you can see, I'm having a little trouble not laughing as I'm describing these services because this is a result driven service uh that could easily be upsold on top of to different businesses out there. I can think of so many."

 

[01:03] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Google Search: Barbershop Miami"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado

 

VISUAL: Barra de busca do Google, exemplo de pesquisa local para demonstração de Google Business Listings

 

[01:05] "Let me go to uh to type in barbershop miami. Okay, because I'm here in Miami and if I looked up a barber shop, here's what I'd see. Obviously, based on location, I'm on I'm on this little island here."

 

[01:18] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Google Business Listings - Barbershop Results"

 

NÚMEROS: Múltiplos resultados locais

 

VISUAL: Mapa do Google com pins de localização, listagens verificadas de barbearias em Miami, cards com informações completas de negócios incluindo reviews, endereços, telefones, websites, botão de direções

 

[01:20] "So, long story short, uh the the these are all Google verified listings. Okay, you can see they have reviews. You can see they have their address information, their phone numbers, their websites, directions, all that cool stuff. And it's the click of a way. It's a click of a button away from somebody, you know, either calling the business, going to the website, or getting directions."

 

[01:43] "And in addition to that, it links to Google Maps. And you can have that long list of the person's business and all their details show up after they're a verified listing."

 

[01:52] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Strategic Referral Network Opportunity"

 

NÚMEROS: $150-$1,000 range de preços do fornecedor

 

VISUAL: Conceito de rede de referência estratégica, oportunidade de revenda de serviços de verificação de listagens

 

[01:54] "I just want to be clear, you can go to this guy, and there's plenty of other people out there who sell, I mean, just dirt cheap the ability to verify people and their business."

 

[02:05] "But as an example, if I would look up the barber shop that I specifically use, I could find that they are not listed inside of a high rank on the Google listings. So I can number one sell the person on getting listed for a business that's not yet listed yet."

 

[02:20] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Target Market: New & Old School Businesses"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado

 

VISUAL: Oportunidade de mercado: negócios iniciantes + empresas tradicionais sem presença digital, mercado global não explorado

 

[02:22] "This would be great for businesses that are just getting in motion. There are so many old school businesses across the world that still have not listed themselves and verified themselves on Google. So this is a massive upsell opportunity."

 

[02:36] "It's also an opportunity to get a transactional service sold uh that can build trust and lead to other services depending on what you offer in the most direct way possible. This is an example of a strategic referral network."

 

[02:50] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Pitch Strategy: Lawn Care Company Example"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado

 

VISUAL: Demonstração de pitch usando resultados do Google como prova social, estratégia de apresentação baseada em exemplos visuais

 

[02:52] "So anyway, this is how I'd pitch it depending on who I'm going after. Okay? And I'm going to act like in my head there's a lawn care company and I'm going to leverage the results of what I see here on Google as an example to show the person who I'm pitching what it would look like, how it would work, how they'd get more leads, how they'd get more sales, etc."

 

[03:12] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Target Industries: Task Labor Businesses"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado

 

VISUAL: Lista de indústrias alvo: lawn care, contractors, plumbers, task labor jobs - negócios dependentes de lead sources

 

[03:14] "The reason I'm going to pick a lawn care business, those kinds of businesses are solely reliant like contractors, uh, plumbers, like anybody who's doing like a task laboring job, they're not advertising usually."

 

[03:27] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Lead Generation Platforms"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado

 

VISUAL: Lista de plataformas: Angie's List, HomeAdvisor, Yelp, Google Business - ecossistema completo de lead sources

 

[03:29] "They're reliant upon tools like angielist.com, homeadvisor.com, and just all these other lead sources where if they file their business, you know, they can get more business that way."

 

[03:40] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Multi-Platform Listing Strategy"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado

 

VISUAL: Estratégia de listagem em múltiplas plataformas: Yelp + Angie's List + Home Advisor + Google, serviços fáceis de vender que constroem confiança

 

[03:42] "So, just listing people on Yelp, listing people on Angie's List, listing people on Home Advisor, uh, and getting their business verified on Google are all massive, easy to sell services that build trust and enable you to help these businesses out in different ways."

 

[03:58] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Video Pitch Demo: John - Lawn Care Service"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado

 

VISUAL: Início da demonstração de pitch ao vivo, role-play de apresentação para cliente fictício

 

[04:00] "So, without further ado, I'm going to act like I'm pitching somebody named John, who has a lawn care service. So, here we go."

 

[04:07] "Hey, John. What's going on? My name is Jeremy. Uh, you likely have no idea who I am, and that's okay. I'm reaching out to you because I looked up your business on Google and I didn't see a Google verified listing, which means I couldn't find something that looked like this that showed me the location of your business, the phone number, uh the address information, your business hours, that links me to your website, that gives me directions where you are, and on a mobile phone, it just gives me a button that says call."

 

[04:40] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Google Business Listing Benefits"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado

 

VISUAL: Demonstração visual de Google Business Listing completo: localização, telefone, endereço, horário, link para website, botão de direções, botão de call em mobile

 

[04:42] "This is one of the best lead generation sources there are. Google has so much traffic in your area for people that are looking up lawn care services right in where you operate out of."

 

[04:55] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Gap Analysis Presentation"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado

 

VISUAL: Análise de ausência do cliente em múltiplas plataformas: não encontrado no Yelp, Angie's List, Home Advisor, Google

 

[04:57] "In addition to that, I looked you up on Yelp and I couldn't find you there either. I then went to Angie's List and Home Advisor and flat out, John, I just I couldn't find your information online."

 

[05:09] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Service Offer & Team Introduction"

 

NÚMEROS: $1,000 transactional fee, 50% upfront, 50% after completion

 

VISUAL: Estrutura de pagamento split, apresentação de equipe (Jeremy + Jill account representative), posicionamento como agência de marketing

 

[05:11] "So, I'm a marketing agency and without scaring you away, uh I'm the person that you're going to be talking to or I'll I'll hand you over to my account representative, Jill, here. And what we do just for a transactional fee of $1,000 is we get you listed on all these services."

 

[05:28] "We'll get your business listed on Google. We'll get your business listed on Yelp. We'll get your business listed on Angie's List and on Home Advisor. And here's the best part. You pay us half upfront and then you pay us the other half after we get this thing done."

 

[05:43] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Value Proposition Summary"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado

 

VISUAL: Proposta de valor completa: mais leads, mais vendas, aproveitamento do mecanismo de busca #1 do mundo, aumento de probabilidade de aparecer em buscas locais

 

[05:45] "So, John, long story short, I want to drive you more leads. I want to drive you more sales. I want to use the number one search engine in the world and all the searches that are already happening right in your area to get you a higher probability of showing up from being listed. You got to show up to play, right?"

 

[06:05] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Trust-Building Strategy"

 

NÚMEROS: $1,000 one-time service

 

VISUAL: Posicionamento do serviço como construtor de confiança, porta de entrada para outros serviços futuros, setup foundacional

 

[06:07] "So, John, $1,000. It's a one-time service. Uh, it's something that we do in order to gain your trust. We offer all kinds of other things, but I don't even want to talk about that yet until we get you foundationally set up."

 

[06:21] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Contact Information Strategy for Non-Digital Savvy Clients"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado

 

VISUAL: Técnica de comunicação adaptada: não apenas mencionar "descrição abaixo", mas verbalizar informações como em voicemail dos anos 2000

 

[06:23] "So, John, my contact information, it's here in the description. And usually with people like this, you want to say your information in the video, especially if they're not listed on Google. They're likely not that digitally savvy."

 

[06:36] "So, when you say it's in the description below, they're likely going to have no idea what the you're talking about. So, here's where you'd want to say something like your phone number, uh, like your email, what your name is. Reiterate all the simple things."

 

[06:50] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Communication Tips for Older Demographics"

 

NÚMEROS: 2-3 times phone number repetition

 

VISUAL: Técnicas de comunicação: falar mais devagar, repetir informações de contato 2-3 vezes, simular deixar voicemail, dar tempo para anotação

 

[06:52] "If you're pitching older people, just talk a little slower. And in addition to that, say your information as if you're leaving a voicemail, like in the early 2000s, right? Hey, you know, this is Jeremy. Give me a call back. Here's my phone number. Say your phone number like two to three times, nice and slow, as if the person's writing it down. And then wrap up your video."

 

[07:13] "All right, John, that's my contact info. I look forward to hearing from you soon. And more importantly, I look forward to getting you listed on Google and all these other lead generation sources. I'll be talking with you soon. Bye."

 

[07:27] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Strategic Referral Network Summary"

 

NÚMEROS: Não especificado

 

VISUAL: Recap do modelo de negócio: múltiplos fornecedores disponíveis oferecendo serviços de listagem com pagamento após entrega

 

[07:29] "And that's that. And as I described, there are so many different people out there who do these, you know, pay us after we get you listed for Yelp, Angie's List, Home Advisor, and right here as an example on Google. So, I'll see you guys in the next"

 

 

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

40+ likes no Facebook (GMBB Genie)

$150 por 1 listing verificado

$650 por 5 listings verificados

$1,000 por 10 listings verificados

$1,000 fee transacional para pacote completo (proposta ao cliente)

50% upfront + 50% após conclusão (estrutura de pagamento)

2-3x repetição de informações de contato

#1 mecanismo de busca do mundo (Google)

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

Strategic Referral Network: Revender serviços de terceiros com markup significativo

Multi-Platform Listing Strategy: Google + Yelp + Angie's List + Home Advisor

Gap Analysis Pitch: Demonstrar ausência do cliente em plataformas-chave

Trust-Building Transaction: Serviço inicial de baixo risco para abrir portas

Visual Proof Selling: Mostrar exemplos reais de listings durante pitch

Result-Driven Service: Garantia de entrega antes do pagamento completo

Upsell Foundation: Estabelecer confiança antes de oferecer serviços maiores

Demographic-Adapted Communication: Ajustar velocidade e repetição para público menos digital

Voicemail-Style Contact Info: Repetir informações como nos anos 2000

Split Payment Structure: Reduzir risco percebido pelo cliente

 

ESTRUTURA:

Fornecedor: GMBB Genie (ou similares) - custo de $150-$1,000

Markup: Vender por $1,000 o que custa $150-$650 (dependendo do volume)

Team Structure: Closer principal + Account Representative (Jill mencionada)

Plataformas de Listagem: Google Business, Yelp, Angie's List, HomeAdvisor

Target Industries: Lawn care, contractors, plumbers, task labor businesses

Características do Target: Negócios não digitalmente savvy, sem presença online, dependentes de lead sources

Delivery Model: Terceirizado via strategic referral partners

 

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

Custo de Aquisição (COGS): $150 (1 listing) a $1,000 (10 listings)

Preço de Venda: $1,000 (pacote completo multi-plataforma)

Margem Potencial: $350-$850 dependendo do número de listings necessários

Payment Terms: 50% upfront ($500) + 50% na entrega ($500)

Modelo de Receita: One-time transactional fee (não recorrente)

Upsell Potential: Serviços adicionais de marketing após estabelecer confiança

Risk Mitigation: Garantia de entrega antes do pagamento final

 

DURAÇÃO: ~7:30 minutos FORMATO: Tutorial de strategic referral network + demonstração ao vivo de pitch de vendas para serviços de Google Business Listing
